---
title: "7 Pipes"
author: "Kyle Lang"
image: "/images/pipes.png"
---

<script>
if (!window.location.href.includes('your-tutorial-website.com') && !sessionStorage.getItem('redirected')) {
    sessionStorage.setItem('redirected', 'true');
    setTimeout(() => {
        window.location.replace("https://www.openstatprog.com/baby-pipes/");
    }, 100);
}
</script>

<noscript>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="2; url=https://www.openstatprog.com/baby-pipes/">
</noscript>

In this module, you will learn about composing functions with pipe operators.

If you are not automatically redirected, [click here](https://www.openstatprog.com/baby-pipes/).
